headline: Beyond Meat® Debuts Latest Beyond Breakfast Sausage® Lineup at Retailers Nationwide Including Kroger, Sprouts Farmers Market and Whole Foods Market
summary: Beyond Meat Debuts Latest Beyond Breakfast Sausage Lineup at Retailers Nationwide Including Kroger, Sprouts Farmers Market and Whole Foods Market New Beyond Breakfast Sausage Links and Patties, now made with heart-healthy avocado oil, deliver craveable taste, clean ingredients and strong nutrition Beyond Breakfast Sausage Patties in Original and Spicy Beyond Breakfast Sandwich featuring Beyond Breakfast Sausage Patties Beyond Breakfast Sausage Links Beyond Breakfast Hash featuring Beyond Breakfa

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Walmart and Kroger
summary: WMT leads supermarket stocks as digital transformation and omnichannel growth drive industry outperformance, with KR also poised to benefit despite margin pressures.
